residential_density_dph: 35 units/ha min (net); 50 units/ha encouraged in appropriate locations
public_open_space_pct: 15% public open space of site (general); 25% on Institutional lands
car_parking_dwelling: four parking zones (Section 12.4.5); per-use ratios in source table
trigger_AA: AA / Habitats Directive screening; Stage 2 AA referenced
trigger_EIA: EIA per Planning and Development Regulations thresholds
trigger_FRA: Flood Risk Assessment; SFRA + sequential approach
trigger_AHIA: Architectural Heritage Impact Assessment for works to protected structures / within ACAs
trigger_TTA: Traffic and Transport Assessment (2014 TTA Guidelines)
notes: Predominantly urban/suburban authority; no rural one-off minimum site-area standard set (one-off housing regarded as urban-generated). Site coverage/plot ratio qualitative only. Source PDF two-column layout; some table values not cleanly extractable. Justification Test not named as separate term.
